raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year> I was asked to pre-pay for nitrous for my XXXXXXXX XXXX  of {$100.00} scheduled for XX/XX/year>. 
XX/XX/year> I canceled the XXXX biopsy well within cancellation policy. I asked for my {$100.00} deposit back. XXXX at the front desk told me NO. She would hold the {$100.00} for any other bills I may have. I HAVE NO OTHER BILLS. 
In the interim, I filed a complaint with the State of Michigan Attorney General. XXXX XXXX responds stating he had no idea, of course money should be refunded. He says not fighting charge dispute. ( ATTACHED ). 
CITI will NOT rule in my favor and close this case IN SPITE of written letter from XXXX XXXX. 
CITI sent me a thing that they can not get refund from merchant? ( ATTACHED ) I have been sending info to CITI to no avail.
